insurance.comprehensive.heroSubtitle: Secure your vehicle in all situations.
insurance.comprehensive.introP1: Comprehensive car insurance is an optional type of insurance that protects your vehicle against unexpected risks. It provides coverage against many risks such as traffic accidents, collisions, theft, fire, natural disasters, and damages that may be caused by third parties.
insurance.comprehensive.introP2: At İlsa Insurance, we help you determine the most suitable comprehensive car insurance package for your needs.
insurance.comprehensive.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes and policy wording.
insurance.comprehensive.stepsLead: Three simple steps to tailor your quote.
insurance.comprehensive.step1Body: Share details about drivers, your vehicle, and where the car is kept.
insurance.comprehensive.step2Body: Select Mini, Limited, Extended, or Full comprehensive — we capture mileage, equipment, and optional extras.
insurance.comprehensive.step3Body: Review indicative options side by side and finalize your policy with our team.
insurance.comprehensive.whyLead: Independent comparison, clear advice, and support based in Ankara.
insurance.comprehensive.why1: Compare offers from multiple insurance companies.
insurance.comprehensive.why2: Best price options for your profile.
insurance.comprehensive.why3: Fast policy issuance when you are ready to proceed.
insurance.comprehensive.why4: Professional support in case of damage or a claim.
insurance.comprehensive.why5: Reliable consulting services based in Ankara.
insurance.comprehensive.pricingTitle: How are car insurance prices determined?
insurance.comprehensive.pricingBody: Premiums vary depending on the vehicle's make and model, age, intended use, the driver's accident history, and the chosen coverage. Contact us for the most accurate quote.
insurance.comprehensive.tableFootnote: Figures are examples only and do not constitute an offer. Actual premiums depend on underwriting criteria.
insurance.comprehensive.typesSectionLead: Different insurance options are available to suit your needs.
insurance.comprehensive.typeLimitedDesc: Limited coverage against a defined set of risks.
insurance.comprehensive.typeExtendedDesc: Broader protection for more scenarios on the road.
insurance.comprehensive.typeFullDesc: Maximum breadth of cover within your chosen programme.
insurance.comprehensive.expertQuote: Comprehensive cover is about matching the policy to how you use the car — not paying for extras you do not need. Start with your driving pattern, then layer optional protections.
insurance.comprehensive.expertSlide1Quot: Comprehensive cover is about matching the policy to how you use the car — not paying for extras you do not need. Start with your driving pattern, then layer optional protections.
insurance.comprehensive.expertSlide2Quot: Deductibles and approved repair networks matter as much as the headline premium — compare like for like before you bind cover.
insurance.comprehensive.expertSlide3Quot: At renewal, revisit mileage, where you park, and any accessories — small changes often mean your cover should change too.
insurance.comprehensive.coverTitle: What does comprehensive car insurance cover?
insurance.comprehensive.coverLead: A standard comprehensive car insurance policy may include the following coverages (subject to policy terms):
insurance.comprehensive.coverItem8: Coverage can be expanded depending on the policy you choose.
insurance.comprehensive.compareLead: Illustrative comparison across tiers — always read your policy schedule and wording.
insurance.comprehensive.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for accurate pricing based on your vehicle and driving profile.
insurance.home.heroSubtitle: Protect your home and belongings in all situations.
insurance.home.introP1: Home insurance is a comprehensive type of insurance that protects your home and its contents against unexpected risks. It provides financial security against fire, flood, theft, natural disasters, and many other risks.
insurance.home.introP2: At İlsa Insurance, we help you determine the most suitable home insurance package for your needs.
insurance.home.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes.
insurance.home.compareTitle: Compare home insurance with İlsa Insurance
insurance.home.compareLead: In just a few minutes you can review indicative home quotes with our straightforward process — backed by brokers who work with multiple trusted insurers.
insurance.home.compareStep1Body: We compare options from a broad panel of providers so you see a representative range of prices and cover levels for your property.
insurance.home.compareStep2Body: A streamlined quote journey means you can move from enquiry to a shortlist quickly, with policy wording explained in plain language.
insurance.home.compareStep3Body: We are not owned by a single insurance company. Our priority is finding cover that fits your home, contents, and budget — not pushing one brand.
insurance.home.typesTitle: Choose the right type of home insurance
insurance.home.typesLead: Whether you are buying your first home, renting, or looking for a better deal, here are three main ways to protect your home and belongings:
insurance.home.typeBuildingsBody:
Cover for the structure of your home — walls, roof, and permanent fixtures such as fitted kitchens and bathrooms.

If you own the property, buildings cover is essential; mortgage lenders usually require it.

Top tip: Base your sum insured on rebuild cost, not only market value.
insurance.home.typeContentsBody:
Protects belongings that would move with you — furniture, electronics, clothing, and more — against risks such as fire, theft, and escape of water.

If you rent, your landlord insures the building; a tenant-focused contents policy protects your possessions. Homeowners typically arrange their own contents cover.
insurance.home.typeCombinedBody:
One policy for both the building and your contents — often simpler with a single renewal date and contact point, and it can be more cost-effective than two separate policies.

Ideal for homeowners who want comprehensive protection for structure and belongings together.
insurance.home.costsCol1P1: Knowing what you might pay helps you avoid overpaying. Across our indicative portfolio, a typical combined buildings-and-contents policy is around ₺9,800 per year* — but your figure will depend on location, construction, and sums insured.
insurance.home.costsCol1P2: Premiums can move with rebuild costs, inflation, and insurer appetite. That is why it is a good time to compare quotes with İlsa Insurance and see whether you can improve cover or price at renewal.
insurance.home.costsTableLead: Illustrative averages from our comparison data — combined, buildings-only, and contents-only:
insurance.home.costsTableFootnote: *Illustrative figures for this page only — not live market data. Contact İlsa Insurance for a binding quote tailored to your property.
insurance.home.premiumLead: National averages are a benchmark, but your individual quote is shaped by a few specific factors:
insurance.home.premiumIndividualBody:
Your postcode: Insurers assess local risks such as flood exposure and regional claims patterns.

Property age: Older homes can cost more to repair; newer builds may benefit from modern standards.

Security measures: Alarms, quality locks, and neighbourhood watch schemes can reduce perceived risk.
insurance.home.premiumRegionalBody:
Competition among insurers can soften quoted prices even when rebuild costs are elevated.

If you have not switched in the last 12 months, your renewal offer may be above current market rates — comparing can help.
insurance.home.expertSlide1Quote: Home cover should reflect how you live in the property — do not under-insure the rebuild cost, and do not pay for contents extensions you will never use.
insurance.home.expertSlide2Quote: Escape of water and storm claims drive a large share of home losses — check excess levels, trace-and-access cover, and accidental damage options before you bind.
insurance.home.expertSlide3Quote: At renewal, update sums insured, any extensions, and security upgrades — small changes to the home often mean your policy should change too.
insurance.home.coverLead: Depending on the chosen policy, it may include the following coverages:
insurance.home.coverFootnote: Coverage can be expanded depending on the insurance company and the chosen package.
insurance.home.daskTitle: The difference between DASK (Compulsory Earthquake Insurance) and home insurance
insurance.home.daskBody: Compulsory earthquake insurance (DASK) only covers structural damage caused by earthquakes. Home insurance, on the other hand, covers fire, flood, theft, and many additional risks. For the most comprehensive protection, both types of insurance are recommended.
insurance.home.whyLead: Local expertise with access to multiple insurers.
insurance.home.why1: Compare offers from multiple insurance companies.
insurance.home.why5: Professional support during the claims process.
insurance.home.pricingTitle: How are home insurance prices determined?
insurance.home.pricingBody: Premiums are determined based on the location of the property, its square footage, building type, the value of the contents, and the coverage chosen. Contact us to receive the most accurate price quote.
insurance.home.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for a tailored home insurance quote.
insurance.health.heroSubtitle: Access private healthcare and protect your budget when it matters.
insurance.health.introP1: Health insurance is an important safeguard that ensures you receive quality healthcare in private hospitals in case of unexpected illnesses and accidents.
insurance.health.introP2: At İlsa Insurance, we help you determine the most suitable individual or family health insurance package for your needs.
insurance.health.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes.
insurance.health.workLead: Three simple steps to compare and apply for health cover.
insurance.health.step1Body: Get personalised quotes in minutes by sharing who needs cover, ages, and your preferred start date.
insurance.health.step2Body: We help you explore indicative options from multiple insurers so you can choose the level of health cover that fits you.
insurance.health.step3Body: When you are ready, complete your application with our team or online — we support you through policy issuance.
insurance.health.buyItem1Body: To get started with a medical insurance plan, compare quotes with İlsa Insurance — we gather options from several companies side by side.
insurance.health.buyItem2Body: You can complete your application online or call our Ankara team. We work with you to find a competitive private healthcare plan for your profile.
insurance.health.buyItem3Body:
Tell us when you want cover to begin and the premium range you have in mind.

You will need each insured person's name and date of birth, plus who should be included on the policy.

Then you can review different quotes and compare levels of cover. For more guidance, speak with our consultants.
insurance.health.basicCoverDesc: This typically pays for treatment when you are admitted as an inpatient — staying overnight in hospital — subject to your policy wording.
insurance.health.mediumCoverDesc: This can include additional care when you are an outpatient — you attend for treatment but are not admitted — depending on the package you choose.
insurance.health.expertSlide1Quote: Health cover should match who needs protection and how you use care — not paying for benefits you will not use. Start with inpatient versus outpatient priorities, then add optional benefits that fit your family.
insurance.health.expertSlide2Quote: Network hospitals, deductibles, and annual limits matter as much as the headline premium — compare policies on the same basis before you bind cover.
insurance.health.expertSlide3Quote: At renewal, update ages, family members, and any chronic conditions — small life changes often mean your cover should change too.
insurance.health.coverLead: Depending on the chosen policy type, it may include the following coverages:
insurance.health.coverFootnote: Coverage scope may vary depending on the insurance company and the chosen package.
insurance.health.supplementaryBody: Supplementary health insurance allows you to receive services at private hospitals contracted with the Social Security Institution (SGK) without paying any difference in fees. You can benefit from a wide range of health services with more affordable premiums.
insurance.health.whyLead: Compare options and move quickly with local support.
insurance.health.pricingTitle: How are health insurance prices determined?
insurance.health.pricingBody: Premiums vary depending on age, current health status, chosen coverage, and insurance company. We compare different options to offer you the best possible deal.
insurance.health.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for a tailored health insurance quote.
